title: Pen Pen
wikitext:
[]: Pen Pen             Quote Post by dasuke » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:14 pm Hey guys! So my question is... where did Pen Pen come from? If Lilith is a Seed of Life and progenitor of the humans, and Adam is the other seed of life and progenitor of the Angels, where is Pen Pen in all this? Also, correct me if I'm wrong, but I don't remember seeing any other animals in the series. Searching through EvaWiki I found this: "In the manga, Misato explains to Shinji that Pen Pen was created as a test animal through genetic experimentation at a research lab she used to work at. When the experiment concluded, Misato adopted Pen Pen to keep him from being euthanized" So Pen Pen was a "normal" penguin before this experiment right? And if so, where are all the others? Did they all die with the Second Impact? But still it begs the question, where did all the animals come from?

[]: Re: Pen Pen             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:22 pm dasuke wrote: So Pen Pen was a "normal" penguin before this experiment right?

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:24 pm ...huh...like your avatar.... Pen-Pen is a Lilith-based life form, as are all creatures on Earth: all life came from Lilith (humans, plants, animals, microbes, the whole lot). It was all supposed to come from Adam, but did not: it's one of the reasons that Adam and the Angels are attempting to enact Instrumentality: their version erases the Lilith-based life in favor of Adamic life.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:29 pm I missed your point about the absence of animals (it's past my bedtime). If you're prepared to accept that the manga is somewhat close to the series, though, there is a cat, ...briefly... Rebuild has animals, though (well, the marine life at the aquarium).

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:35 pm Pen Pen is God. I'm not joking.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 09, 2014 6:42 pm Yes...yes, I am. I mean, he is. Yes he is.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 09, 2014 7:37 pm Evangelion is not even remotely scientifically accurate as far as evolution is concerned. What more is there to say?

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 09, 2014 7:42 pm ^ ....Cyborg-robot mommies.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 09, 2014 7:46 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion is not even remotely scientifically accurate as far as evolution is concerned. What more is there to say?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 09, 2014 8:50 pm Two active members with the same avatar makes my head spin.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 09, 2014 8:53 pm Maybe it's a sign for me to change my avatar? ..... Naaaaahh.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 09, 2014 8:55 pm Why would you change yours? You've got avatar senority. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 09, 2014 8:57 pm ^ Hey, wait a minute, you're right! Oi! Dasuke! Bring it.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 09, 2014 8:59 pm Speakin' of the topic at hand (which I didn't answer) I'm not sure if there's anything special. I mean, there's dogs and cats in the show as well. Adam made angels, and Lilith made all other life. See the Wiki if you're curious for more- it's an amazing resource.

[]: Re: Pen Pen             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Apr 10, 2014 2:27 am pwhodges wrote: , perhaps created as a modified clone of a normal penguin.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Apr 11, 2014 10:15 am If only Pen Pen got a chance to pilot an Evangelion. That would be so awesome

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Apr 11, 2014 1:39 pm I like how the Manga drew this whole parallel to her adopting Shinji, not just out of pity or for the job but because she simply likes to have company. There, it is mentioned that she got him from some place she used to work for before NERV. It's hard to imagine Misato in some sciencey setting, but she did meet Ritsuko and Kaji in college. It's easy to imagine her feeling sorry for the lab animals (not just because of compassion, but because it may have reminded her of the way GEHIRN just "kept" her after SI. Putting her in an ordinary institution was probably too much of a security risk considering what she'd seen, and her mom probably died in SI) and unable to continue the job, or maybe feelin it was too much like her father's job - but we know where she ended up next, so yeah. Maybe participating in a project to conserve endangered animals was also a way to "make up" for the stuff her father's experiments apparently caused. It's also saying something that Misato happened to pick a pet native to Antartcica...Maybe out of some thought out, "Well, we both lost our Home in SI, so you can have mine." It offers all kinds of angles to think about.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Apr 11, 2014 1:59 pm ^ In that sense maybe Misato saw Shinji as 'another Pen Pen' a lost and scared boy with no where to go and she felt sorry for him and took him home.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri Apr 11, 2014 2:06 pm I think she saw him as more of a Pen Pen with benefits.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Apr 11, 2014 3:52 pm ^I'm now beginning to imagine the kiss scene from EoE, but with Pen-Pen in Shinji's place. In all seriousness, I doubt Misato saw Shinji as Pen Pen.
